reference: TO SOME WITH A SMART SOUSE ON THE EPIGASTER HE WOULD MAKE THEIR MIDRIFF SWAG THEN REDOUBLING THE BLOW GAVE THEM SUCH A HOMEPUSH ON THE NAVEL THAT HE MADE THEIR PUDDINGS TO GUSH OUT
text: To some, with a smart sous on the epigaster, he would make their midriff swag. Then, redoubling the blow, gave them such a home push on the navel that he made their puddings to gush out.
